problem id: cbece006
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(2) AND NOT SHR(7)) XOR NOT SHL(4)

examples:
  00111111 -> 11110011
  11010111 -> 11010001
  01110000 -> 00111110
  10001110 -> 00100101
  11010101 -> 11111001
  00101100 -> 10001111
  11101011 -> 11100001
  10011110 -> 01100101
  11001010 -> 01110101
  10000001 -> 11101001

query: 11100111
predicted answer: 00010001
